svg.title: Reflexion Agent Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the draft, search, revise loop of a Reflexion Agent

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the user input node in the Reflexion Agent?')
g.text: e.g. "How can small businesses use AI?"

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Draft node in the Reflexion Agent — what does first_responder_chain do?')
g.text: Writes ~250 word answer + reflects + generates search queries

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the execute_tools node — how does Tavily search work here?')
g.text: Runs Tavily web search for each query, returns results

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the revisor_chain node — what does it do with search results?')
g.text: Rewrites answer using search results + adds citations

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the event_loop condition — when does the agent stop iterating?')
sendPrompt('What does the final output of the Reflexion Agent look like?')
